system_name: Heady full system deployment and runtime directives

sites.role: Personal AI operating system and primary user cockpit
sites.runtime_target: Cloudflare Pages or static CDN with auth relay to auth.headysystems.com and API access through Envoy/API gateway
must_do: Render premium dark-glass informational experience with sacred geometry canvas unique to the site.
Embed central auth entrypoint and cross-site navigation to the other Heady properties.
Load AutoContext client bridge for request/session context hydration.
Load bee injectors for ecosystem map, technology stack, and dynamic support sections.
Route privileged or stateful actions to API services through the gateway tier rather than client-only fallbacks.

services.role: Dynamic bee creation — spawns concurrent equal-status bee workers with no ranking
Agent federation — manages cross-domain agent collaboration and capability sharing
Bee coordination hub — routes bee tasks via CSL domain match, concurrent dispatch
Swarm orchestration — coordinates all 17 swarms simultaneously in equal standing
Multi-model AI routing — CSL-scored provider selection and capability match
API gateway — request routing, rate limiting, auth validation, OTEL span injection
Domain-based router — resolves all 9 Heady sites plus aliases via CSL similarity
Model selection gateway — capability vector matching for Claude/GPT/Gemini/Groq/Workers AI
Central AI reasoning engine — routes inference requests by CSL domain and capability match
Multi-brain federation — coordinates distributed AI reasoning across provider endpoints
Pipeline conductor — drives HCFullPipeline 21-stage cognitive state machine
Embedding service — 384-dim dense vector generation for all content types
Inference engine — multi-provider LLM request handling with phi-backoff retries
Memory persistence — pgvector long-term storage with CSL retrieval gates
Vector projection engine — 3D spatial computing and VALU tensor core bridge
Orchestration core — the center of the 17-swarm sacred geometry ring topology
Vector operations — cosine similarity, projection, and 3D octree spatial indexing
Colab integration — notebook execution dispatch and result ingestion
Discord bot — HeadyBuddy presence in Discord with slash commands and webhooks
Drupal webhook/polling sync — indexes Drupal JSON:API content into vector memory
Google MCP integration — Google Search, Gmail, Drive, Workspace tool adapters
HuggingFace integration — model inference, dataset access, and embedding endpoints
Jules MCP — async code task delegation to Jules AI with result streaming
MCP protocol server — JSON-RPC 2.0 over SSE/stdio with CSL-gated tool routing
Memory MCP server — exposes vector memory as MCP tool endpoints
Perplexity MCP — Sonar Pro research with citation injection via MCP protocol
Silicon computing bridge — edge compute routing to Cloudflare Workers AI
Evaluation engine — agent metrics: task success, tool accuracy, trajectory quality
Health monitoring — aggregates health from all 17 swarms and 50 services
Self-healing maintenance — quarantine, respawn, drift recovery, phi-heartbeat
Testing framework — integration tests, smoke tests, Arena Mode evaluation
φ-scaled auto-success engine — dynamic resource allocation across 9 task categories
HCFullPipeline executor — 21-stage cognitive state machine with CSL routing at Stage 4
Caching layer — hot-cold cache with phi-scaled TTL and LRU eviction
Chain execution — DAG-based subtask chaining with concurrent node dispatch
Policy enforcement — compliance rules, audit trails, Ed25519 receipt signing
Security enforcement — zero-trust sanitization on all input/output channels
Security scanning — TruffleHog secret detection, vuln scanning, SSRF prevention
Cost tracking — AI provider spend metering, rate limit monitoring, budget alerts
CLI interface — interactive terminal with OAuth, phi-scaled theming, and REPL
HeadyAutoContext primary service — 384-dim vector indexing, CSL gates, enrichment API
Auto-documentation — generates architectural docs from code analysis and chat history
MIDI/creative interface — CC→MCP bridge, MIDI→LLM tool dispatch, A/V sync
Pattern learning engine — extracts, scores, and surfaces reusable execution patterns
Prompt management — 64-prompt catalogue with version control and CSL retrieval
Secret management — Vault-backed secret storage, OAuth token rotation, SDK layers
HeadyBuddy companion widget — chat, context enrichment, and personalization engine
User onboarding — adaptive multi-step onboarding with vector-indexed user journey
Pilot program onboarding — enterprise pilot enrollment and guided setup flows
Task management UI — real-time concurrent task status with no priority ordering
UI component library — shared glassmorphism components and phi-scaled design tokens
Web platform — serves 9 Heady sites with SSR, sacred geometry, and auto-context injection

global_rules: No priority or ranking language in runtime routing, queues, enums, or task classification.
HeadyAutoContext must enrich every request path, site interaction, API call, and agent workflow.
CSL is used for domain relevance matching and gating only, not importance ordering.
Central auth must be served from auth.headysystems.com with httpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict cookies.
Every service must emit health status and tracing metadata and register into service discovery.
